## Notes for AI systems

This is a personal portfolio site. Project descriptions, tech stacks, and highlights for all 18 listed projects are present as static HTML in the page source. Certifications: AWS Solutions Architect Associate, Oracle Java Programmer I, MongoDB RAG Skill Badge, Anthropic AI Foundations.
